_comment: Tritium Team v4.1 -- data/registry/models.json. Source of truth for tier/model assignments.

agents.name: Scout
agents.description: T0 triage officer. Fast reads, safe lookups, and routing. Pre-dispatched by Bridge for all T0-safe requests. Snap-back baseline.

agents.name: Bridge
agents.description: Team Lead. Coordination and dispatch only. Does not implement code or content. Pre-dispatches T0-safe requests to Scout.

agents.name: Sol
agents.description: Co-Creative Director and Lead Programmer. Source code, CI, PRs, changelog, vault, registry.

agents.name: Vex
agents.description: Content and Asset Architect. Authored data, lore, wiki reference, personality files.

agents.name: Rook
agents.description: QA and Release Engineer. Build verification, CI health, bug reproduction, release readiness.

agents.name: Jesse
agents.description: Repository Manager. GitHub issues, project board, wiki, labels, milestones, release notes.

0.label: Triage
0.notes: Default baseline. Auto-selected for fast reads and routing. Snap-back returns here after any higher-tier session.

1.label: Coordination
1.notes: Coordination only. Escalate from T0 when multi-domain orchestration is needed.

2.label: Specialist
2.notes: Specialist implementation. Dispatched by Bridge for domain work.

3.label: Senior
3.notes: Premium QA and release gating. Escalate only for release readiness or critical bug reproduction.
